channel.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon May 31st, 2021
item.description:
Development Projects

Miscellaneous

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Aug 16th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

APIs

  • PokemonGO-Pokedexstars100 - Pokédex of Pokémon GO in JSON.

    • Development Projects

    Bots

  • PokeBuddystars457 - A Pokémon GO bot.

    • Resources & Others

    Wiki

  • GamePress
  • Pokémon Go Info

    • Resources & Others

    Others

  • InfoSpreadsheet - Datamined info about Pokémon GO species with IV calculations.
  • InfoSpreadsheet#2 - Pokémon GO species data with their movesets.

    • Development Projects

    Miscellaneous

  • PokemonGO-IV-Renamerstars88 - Automatically renames your Pokémon to their IV stats.

    • Resources & Others

    Maps

  • iPokeGostars636 - A native iOS client to map the Pokémon around you.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Aug 8th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

Miscellaneous

  • pokemongo-genymotionstars20 - Play Pokémon GO from your Genymotion device.

Development Projects

Miscellaneous

  • alfred-pokedexstars24 - Alfred 3 workflow to lookup information about Pokémon.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Aug 6th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

Bots

  • Poketrainerstars124 - A fast and feature filled bot in Python.

    • Development Projects

    Miscellaneous

  • pogo-optimizerstars508 - Shows you the IVs and information necessary to determine which Pokémon get ground into candy.

    • Resources & Others

    Maps

  • PokemonGo-Mapstars7.6k - Live visualization of all the Pokémon in your area and more.
  • PokemonGo-DesktopMapstars1.8k - Electron app for Pokémon GO that shows Pokémon nearby.

    • Resources & Others

    Tips & Tricks

  • Mashable - How to be the best, least annoying, Pokémon GO trainer.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Aug 5th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

APIs

  • pgoapistars1.4k - Pokémon GO API lib/demo.
  • Pokemon-Go-Rocket-APIstars385 - Client API library for Pokémon GO in C#.
  • PokeAPIstars2.4k - A RESTful API for Pokémon (http://pokeapi.co/).
  • Pokemon-GO-node-apistars882 - Pokémon GO API Node.js library.
  • Pokemon GO Java APIstars1.1k - Pokémon GO API for Java.
  • Pokemon Name APIstars330 - Get a list of Pokémon names in JSON.

    • Development Projects

    Bots

  • PokemonGoBotstars574 - Bot that plays Pokémon GO.
  • slack-pokemonstars340 - A bot for having Pokémon battles in Slack.
  • PokeSlackstars40 - Alerts you of nearby Pokémon.
  • TwitchPlaysPokemonstars104 - A bot mimicking Twitch Plays Pokémon.

    • Development Projects

    Miscellaneous

  • Pokemon-Go-Controllerstars2.5k - Play Pokémon GO safely or at unavailable area.
  • pokemon-go-mitm-nodestars477 - Pokémon GO MITM Proxy.
  • PokeMMOstars675 - WebGL Pokémon MMO Engine with Realtime Editor.
  • PoGoToolsstars3 - A set of CLI tools for getting IVs, transferring Pokémon, evolving Pokémon, and trashing items.
  • slack-pokemon-emojistars23 - A tool to upload all the Pokémon to Slack emoji.

    • Resources & Others

    Communities

  • /r/pokemongo - Pokémon GO Subreddit.
  • RazerGo - Localized Pokémon GO chat.
  • PokeDates - The first-ever Pokémon GO dating service.
  • /r/pokemongodev - Reverse engineering game/API.

    • Resources & Others

    Tips & Tricks

  • TechCrunch - 13 ways to be better at Pokémon GO.
  • Imore - Pokémon GO: 21 tips, tricks, and cheats to be the best trainer in the world.
  • Heavy - Pokémon GO: 10 Cheats, Tip & Tricks You Need to Know.

    • Resources & Others

    Others

  • Silphroad - Pokémon GO tools & reference charts.
  • Server Status - Shows you if Pokémon GO is down.
  • Egg Statistics - Pokémon GO Egg Reporter.
  • Poke Assistant - Collection of calculators for Pokémon GO.

    • Development Projects

    Apps

  • iPokeMonstars426 - Pokémon like game on iOS with Location Based Service.
  • pokemon-onlinestars268 - Online Pokémon Battle Simulator.

    • Resources & Others

    Maps

  • pokelocaterstars135 - Display Pokémon nearby your location on a map.
  • Pokemapstars1k - A native Android client to map the Pokémon around you.
  • Poke Vision - Find Pokémon by location.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Aug 4th, 2016
item.description:
Resources & Others

Communities

  • /r/thesilphroad - Very indepth game discussion and such.

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Jul 27th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

Apps

  • Pokemon-Showdownstars3.1k - Pokémon battle simulator.

    • Resources & Others

    Wiki

  • Pokedexstars1.2k - More than you ever wanted to know about Pokémon.
  • Pokemon GO Wiki Guide by IGN
  • Pokémon GO Wiki
  • Pokémon GO Wikipedia

item.title: tobiasbueschel/awesome-pokemon Jul 20th, 2016
item.description:
Development Projects

Miscellaneous

  • pokecrystalstars1.5k - Disassembly of Pokémon Crystal.
  • x-pokemonstars89 - A web component to display Pokémon.
  • pokeredstars2.7k - Disassembly of Pokémon Red/Blue.
  • pokemon-reverse-engineering-toolsstars252 - Tools for compiling and disassembling Pokémon Red and Pokémon Crystal.
